pages.text:
BUYING GUIDE
KIVIK
Sofa series


MODELS:
Chaise
Loveseat
Sofa
Corner section
Ottoman with storage


Removable,
washable covers


Choice of cover                 Comfortable sofa at an attractive price
                                KIVIK seating series is made for people who want extra comfortable
                                 seating, without it costing more than necessary. Every detail, inside
                         and out, is adapted to give you as much comfort as possible. You can
Available in leather and               also combine the different parts in the series in different ways to suit
coated fabric                  you and your home. This way, you always have room for relaxation.

                         Count on maximum comfort
Fixed cover                   The seat cushions in KIVIK seating series are made of pocket springs,
                                 high-resilience foam and polyester fibers -- adding both relaxing softness
                         and firm support where your body needs it. The wide armrests have a
                                  thick padding that's nice both to rest your neck against and to sit on. If
Dry-clean                    you choose to add a chaise and ottoman you will have a combination you
                           can really stretch out on -- and count on maximum comfort when you sit
                       down on the sofa.

                         Choose your own combination
Storage in ottoman                           It's easy to adapt KIVIK seating series to suit your home and your needs.
                          You can, for example, combine the sofas with a generous chaise for extra
                        room and comfort or add the corner section to create an even bigger
                            combination to seat as many people as you like. You have every possibility
                               to create your own personal solution!


Includes a free 10-year
 limited warranty. For
Limited Warranty details visit


Not all products may be available in all stores. See what is available at your local store by visiting

COMBINATIONS
Overall size: Width×Depth×Height

TRESUND anthracite                                    794.702.48                   TRESUND anthracite                                  694.829.06
TRESUND light beige                                    094.702.42                  TRESUND light beige                                 894.829.05
KELINGE gray-turquoise                                 194.827.96                     KELINGE gray-turquoise                              694.430.43
TIBBLEBY beige/gray                                   294.702.36                     TIBBLEBY beige/gray                                 894.405.00
                                                                  GRANN/BOMSTAD black, fixed cover                    805.195.07

Go to know

Fabric sofas

Our fabrics have been tested                                  Durable in different ways
At IKEA we test the fabric covers on our sofas and armchairs         Tough tests are an important way to check the durability of our
so you can be sure they're durable. The fabric's ability to resist          fabric covers, but they don't tell the whole story. Durability also
abrasion is tested by using a machine to rub it against another       depends on materials, construction and manner of use. Heavy,
fabric while applying firm pressure. A fabric that can take 15,000        tightly woven fabrics with a flat surface are most resistant to
cycles is suitable for furniture that must withstand everyday life        abrasion. Fabrics with a mixture of natural and synthetic fibers
at home -- and if it can take more than 30,000 cycles, it is very        can withstand abrasion better than fabrics with only natural
resistant to abrasion. All fabrics are sensitive to sunlight, which          fibers. Yarn-dyed fabrics are more durable than fabrics with
is why we also check that our fabrics resist fading effectively.           printed patterns. And a dirty cover wears out faster than a clean
                                                                  one. The fabric is also affected by how you use your sofa, of
                                                                     course.


                                                                                                                            Resistance
                                                                                                                              to abrasion          Light-
                                                                                 Washing instructions             (cycles)             fastness (1-8)

 Tresund fabric has a structured surface created by irregular yarns and material blends. It has a stable   Machine washable warm          30,000             5
 yet soft hand feel. 55% cotton, 25% polyester, 12% viscose/rayon, 8% linen.

 Kelinge is a soft, wide-wale corduroy fabric that has a slight lustre. The thickness of the corduroy gives   Machine washable warm          50,000             5
 a comfortable feeling. 100% polyester.

 Tibbleby is a fabric with a smooth surface, slight lustre and a discreet herringbone pattern.            Machine washable warm          50,000               5-6
 100% polyester.


Leather with coated fabric


Our fabrics have been tested                                   Grain leather
KIVIK leather sofa is a combination of our 3⁄64" thick grain            The natural variations in the hide are visible, as the leather
leather called GRANN, which is a soft yet durable dyed-through           is treated with only a light color coating for protection. The
leather, and BOMSTAD coated fabric. Coated fabric has the look        leather will acquire a beautiful patina over time. It's also easy to
and feel of leather at a lower cost.                                   care for -- just vacuum regularly with the soft brush attachment
This is why IKEA often uses a combination of both, with             on your vacuum cleaner.
leather on direct contact areas such as seating surfaces and
armrests (1), and coated fabric on other outer surfaces (2).

SERVICES

IKEA products are designed to be taken home and assembled by you. That way, you'll save the most money. But if you would
like some help, we can offer a range of services. Assembly and delivery services fulfilled by an Independent Service Provider.
Contact your local IKEA store or visit the IKEA website for details:


DELIVERY SERVICE                      TASKRABBIT ASSEMBLY SERVICE
Most of our products are designed and          All IKEA products are designed to be
packaged so that you can take them          assembled by you, but you don't have
home yourself. If you prefer, we can              to. We've partnered with TaskRabbit
arrange for delivery of your purchases         to connect you with a network of
directly to your home or business. Same      independent 'Taskers' who can provide
day, next day or same week deliveries         quick and convenient assembly and
are available. We can also arrange for        mounting services for your IKEA
delivery at a later date if you would like.       purchases made online and in stores.
                                       You can schedule assembly service
                                                 for as soon as the same day, with
                                           the Tasker of your choice. Visit
                                           TaskRabbit.com/IKEA or see a
                                          co-worker for more details.


*Services and prices may vary, please see  or your local IKEA store for details.


Valid as of April 1, 2023 posting. Prices and availability of products are subject to change
without notice. Please see  or your local IKEA store for the most up to date pricing.
